comments.text: Recently i met an accident on 16  July 2024. There i had comprehensive Policy with Go Digit. Then i followed the process by Online. One after one i did. Finally i sent mail to the office. Their Excucative called me & through Online process every information gathered. Finally my vehicle expensive was near 9000 Rs. After all the documents submitted i got 4,260 Rs. the officer was truly very much helpful & Gentlemen
comments.author: @BiswajitHalder-iv3ql

comments.text: My vehicle also has the insurance policy of Go Digit. The vehicle is in first party insurance. To whom should I contact? The showroom or insurance company itselfm
comments.author: @BhagyashriP2822

comments.text: @BhagyashriP2822  Dear Friend, at first make a call to the Official number which is on your insurance paper. Then they itself call you within a Hour.. But Do Not go any garage or showroom. You can click photos and Videos of Damage portion of your bike/scooty. It will help you for getting Amount...
comments.author: @BiswajitHalder-iv3ql

comments.text:
​ @BiswajitHalder-iv3ql 
Thank you so much for your reply. After reading your comment I read the insurance papers and contacted the help line number and even their official website. I got the claim for it. The workers of the showroom weren't so happy though 😅 But hopefully Digit's support executive is very helpful. I'm glad i came across your comment!!! Thank you so much once againnnn.
comments.author: @BhagyashriP2822

comments.text:
@BhagyashriP2822  Thank You Too.. We are Bhartiya & We are Family... 

Jai Sree Ram 🚩

Which would be 3,4k
